sentences.text: The Svadu extension adds support and CSR controls for hardware updating of PTE A/D bits.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svadu" Extension for Hardware Updating of A/D Bits, Version 1.0

sentences.text: If the Svadu extension is implemented, the `menvcfg`.ADUE field is writable.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svadu" Extension for Hardware Updating of A/D Bits, Version 1.0

sentences.text: If the hypervisor extension is additionally implemented, the `henvcfg`.ADUE field is also writable.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svadu" Extension for Hardware Updating of A/D Bits, Version 1.0

sentences.text: See and for the definitions of those fields.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svadu" Extension for Hardware Updating of A/D Bits, Version 1.0

sentences.text: defines the semantics of hardware updating of A/D bits.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svadu" Extension for Hardware Updating of A/D Bits, Version 1.0

sentences.text: When hardware updating of A/D bits is disabled, the Svade extension, which mandates exceptions when A/D bits need be set, instead takes effect.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svadu" Extension for Hardware Updating of A/D Bits, Version 1.0

sentences.text: The Svade extension is also defined in .
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svadu" Extension for Hardware Updating of A/D Bits, Version 1.0
